description: Login flow configuration per provider. `flow: callback` needs a local port bind + CLI relay for the OAuth redirect (port/callbackPath must be set — they match CLIProxyAPI's hardcoded redirect URIs). `flow: device-code` shows the user a URL and short code; the gateway subprocess polls the provider until authorization completes. Verified against github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI internal/auth/*/*.go.
